title: Add Physics study with AI to learn
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: The hive learns physics
gist.blurb: A new community app just dropped! 'Physics study with AI' helps you practice physics problems with step-by-step AI solutions. Time to brush up on your thermodynamics.
gist.summary: Added 'Physics study with AI' to the community app showcase, offering step-by-step solutions and explanations for physics problems.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and use a new AI-powered physics study tool built by the community.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee studying physics. She could be wearing tiny reading glasses, looking at a glowing atom or a falling apple. The monitor robot companion can display physics equations or an atom on its screen.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, hovering next to a chunky retro robot with a CRT monitor head displaying a glowing atom symbol. The robot is holding a small pixelated physics textbook. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, hovering next to a chunky retro robot with a CRT monitor head displaying a glowing atom symbol. The robot is holding a small pixelated physics textbook. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
